text: The solution of \(\left(x\cos\dfrac{y}{x}+y\sin\dfrac{y}{x}\right)y\,dx=\left(y\sin\dfrac{y}{x}-x\cos\dfrac{y}{x}\right)x\,dy\) is
explanation:
Homogeneous equation. Let \(y=vx\). Using \(t=V\cos V\) substitution:

\(2\ln x+c=-\ln(V\cos V)\implies xy\cos\dfrac{y}{x}=\pm e^{-c}\)
name: Homogeneous ODE Solution

text: The order of the DE whose general solution is \(y=(c_1+c_2)\sin(x+c_3)+c_4e^{x+c_5}\) is
name: Order from General Solution

text: The product of degree and order of \(\left(\dfrac{d^2y}{dx^2}\right)^2-\left(\dfrac{dy}{dx}\right)^3=y^3\) is
explanation:
Order = 2 (highest derivative \(d^2y/dx^2\)), Degree = 2 (power of highest-order term).

Product \(=2\times2=4\).
name: Order and Degree Product

text: The integrating factor of \(x\dfrac{dy}{dx}+3y=x^2\) is
name: Integrating Factor

text: The solution of \(\dfrac{d^2y}{dx^2}=0\) represents
explanation: \(d^2y/dx^2=0\implies y'=a\implies y=ax+b\): equation of straight lines.
name: Geometric Interpretation

text: The differential equation of all straight lines through the origin is
name: DE of Lines Through Origin

text: The solution of \(\cos(x+y)\,dy=dx\) with \(y(0)=0\) is
name: Substitution in ODE

text: The general solution of \(\dfrac{dy}{dx}+yg'(x)=g(x)g'(x)\) is
explanation:
IF \(=e^{g(x)}\). Multiplying and integrating:

\(ye^{g(x)}=e^{g(x)}(g(x)-1)+e^c\).

Taking log: \(g(x)+\log(1+y-g(x))=c\)
name: Linear ODE with Functional Coefficient

text: The particular solution of \(\dfrac{dy}{dx}=\sec y\) with \(y(0)=0\) is
explanation: Separating: \(\cos y\,dy=dx\implies\sin y=x+c\). With \(y(0)=0\): \(c=0\implies x=\sin y\).
name: Separable ODE Particular Solution

text: The solution of \(x\dfrac{dy}{dx}=y(\log y-\log x+1)\) is
explanation:
Homogeneous. Let \(y=vx\): \(x\dfrac{dv}{dx}=v\log v\).

\(\int\dfrac{dv}{v\log v}=\int\dfrac{dx}{x}\implies\log(\log v)=\log(cx)\implies y=xe^{cx}\)
name: Homogeneous ODE with Log

text: In a bank, principal increases at \(6\%\) per year. Time (years) to double â‚¹6000 is
name: Growth Rate ODE

text: If the curve passes through \((0,1)\) with \(y=\int x^3e^{x^4}dx\), then \(f(y)=x\) gives
name: Curve from Integral

text: Solving \(\dfrac{dy}{dx}=\dfrac{x-y+3}{2(x-y)+5}\), the value of \(t\) in \(x=2(x-y)+\log(t)+c\) is
name: ODE by Substitution

text: The general solution of \(\log\dfrac{dy}{dx}=ax+by\) is
name: Variable Separable ODE

text: Solving \(\dfrac{dy}{dx}=\dfrac{1+y^2}{(\tan^{-1}y)-x}\), the solution is
name: Linear ODE with Arctan

text: Solving \(x\dfrac{dy}{dx}=y+\sqrt{x^2+y^2}\), the solution is
name: Homogeneous ODE with Square Root

text: A curve passes through \((3,4)\) with slope \(=\dfrac{1}{2y}\) at any point. The curve is
name: Curve from Slope â€” Parabola

text: The equation of curve through \((1,2)\) with tangent angle \(\tan^{-1}(2x+3y)\) with \(X\)-axis is
name: Tangent Slope Condition

text: The general solution of \(\tan y\,dx+\sec^2y\cdot\tan x\,dy=0\) is
explanation:
Separating: \(\cot x\,dx=-\dfrac{\sec^2y}{\tan y}dy\).

Integrating: \(\ln\sin x=-\ln\tan y+\ln c\implies\sin x\tan y=c\)
name: Separable Trig ODE

text: The solution of \(\dfrac{dy}{dx}+y\csc^2x=\csc^2x\cot x\) is
explanation: IF \(=e^{-\cot x}\). Let \(t=-\cot x\): \(ye^{-\cot x}=-\int te^t dt+c=(\cot x+1)e^{-\cot x}+c\)
name: Linear ODE with Cosecant

text: If \(c\) is a parameter, the DE of \(x^2=c(y+c)^2\) is
name: DE from Parametric Family

text: If \(f(0)=1\), \(f'(0)=2\) and \(\begin{vmatrix}f(x)&f'(x)\\f'(x)&f''(x)\end{vmatrix}=0\), then \(f(x)=\)
name: ODE from Wronskian

text: The order of the DE for parabolas with axes along \(X\)-axis, foci at origin is
name: Order of DE for Parabola Family

text: The DE of all parabolas with axes parallel to \(Y\)-axis is
name: DE of Parabola Family

text: The solution of \(\dfrac{dy}{dx}+2y\tan x=\sin x\) with \(y=0\) at \(x=\pi/3\) is
name: Particular Solution of Linear ODE

text: The DE formed by eliminating \(a,b\) from \(y=e^x(a\cos x+b\sin x)\) is
name: Forming DE by Eliminating Constants

text: If \(y=A(x)e^{-\int P\,dx}\) solves \(y'+Py=Q\), then \(A'(x)=\)
explanation: The solution formula gives \(A(x)=\int Qe^{\int P\,dx}dx\), so \(A'(x)=Q(x)e^{\int P\,dx}\).
name: Structure of Linear ODE Solution

text: I: \(y=(\alpha+\beta+\gamma)x\) gives order 3. II: \(y=\alpha x+\beta\sin x+\gamma e^x\) gives order 3.
explanation:
I: \(y=kx\) has 1 constant \(\implies\)order = 1. **I is false.**

II: 3 independent constants \(\alpha,\beta,\gamma\implies\)order = 3. **II is true.**
name: Order Analysis True/False

text: The general solution of \(\sin y\dfrac{dy}{dx}=\cos y(1-x\cos y)\) is
name: ODE via Substitution sec y

text: The DE of \(y=e^x(A\cos x+B\sin x)\) is
name: DE from e^x Trig Solution

text: The solution of \(x\dfrac{dy}{dx}=y-x\tan\dfrac{y}{x}\) is
explanation:
Homogeneous, \(y=vx\): \(x\,dv/dx=-\tan v\implies\int\cot v\,dv=-\int dx/x\).

\(\ln|\sin v|=\ln(k/|x|)\implies y=x\sin^{-1}(k/x)\)
name: Homogeneous ODE with tan(y/x)

text: If \(m,n\) are order and degree of DE of parabolas with focus at origin and axis along \(X\), then \(mn-m+n=\)
name: mn-m+n for Parabola Family

text: The general solution of \((1+e^{x/y})dx+e^{x/y}(1-x/y)dy=0\) is
explanation:
Let \(x=vy\). After substitution and integration:

\(\ln(v+e^v)=-\ln y+\ln c\implies y(v+e^v)=c\implies x+ye^{x/y}=c\)
name: Exact ODE by Substitution

text: The DE of the family \(y^2=4a(x+a)\) is
name: DE of Parabola Family y^2=4a(x+a)

text: The general solution of \(\dfrac{dy}{dx}+y\tan x=2x+x^2\tan x\) is
explanation:
IF \(=\sec x\). \(y\sec x=\int(2x+x^2\tan x)\sec x\,dx+c=x^2\sec x+c\).

\(y=x^2+c\cos x\)
name: Linear ODE with IBP

text: If \(l,m\) are degree and order of DE of all circles with radius 5 in \(XY\)-plane, then \(2l+3m=\)
explanation:
Family with 2 parameters (centers). Order \(m=2\). After elimination: \(25(y'')^2=[1+(y')^2]^3\), degree \(l=2\).

\(2l+3m=4+6=10\)
name: Circles Family â€” Degree and Order

text: The general solution of \(\cos^2x\dfrac{dy}{dx}-(\tan2x)y=\cos^4x\) on \(-\pi/4<x<\pi/4\) is
explanation:
Rewrite, find IF \(=\dfrac{\cos2x}{2\cos^2x}\). Integrate and simplify:

\(y=\dfrac{\sin^2x+c}{2(1-\tan^2x)}=\dfrac{1}{2}\cdot\dfrac{\sin^2x+c}{1-\tan^2x}\)
name: Linear ODE on Restricted Interval

text: The order and degree of \(y=px+\sqrt{a^2p^2+b^2}\) (where \(p=dy/dx\)) are
explanation: Squaring: \((x^2-a^2)p^2-2xyp+y^2-b^2=0\). Contains \(p=dy/dx\) only â€” order = 1, degree = 2.
name: Clairaut-Type ODE

text: The solution of \(\dfrac{dx}{dy}+2yx=2y\) passing through \((2,0)\) is
name: Particular Solution by Separation

text: The DE having \(x^2/a^2+y^2/b^2=1\) as general solution is
name: DE of Ellipse Family

text: The general solution of \(\dfrac{dx}{dy}+\dfrac{x}{y}=x^2\) is
explanation: Bernoulli: let \(t=1/x\): \(dt/dy-t/y=-1\). IF \(=1/y\). Solution: \(t/y=-\log y+c\implies 1/x=cy-y\log y\)
name: Bernoulli DE
